courses.subject: Multi-Subject (Exam Prep)
courses.curriculum: Ethiopian National Curriculum - Grade 8 Ministry Exam

learning_outcomes: Master all Grade 8 national exam subjects
Practice with exam-style questions and mock tests
Develop time management skills for exams
Score in top percentiles on national assessment

courses.subject: Multi-Subject

courses.description: Specialized Computer Science tutoring covering programming basics, computer applications, ICT skills, and coding fundamentals. Prepares students for digital careers and university tech programs.
